NoteEditorDemoPage.description: A sample note with every enabled rich text block.

Greet.error: An error occurred. Please try again.
Greet.missingNameDesc: Please enter a name to greet.

ModeCard.title: Modes
ModeCard.description: Choose your mode or customize your style

ThemesList.title: Themes
ThemesList.noThemesDescription: No themes match your search term.

HotkeysDialog.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
HotkeysDialog.description: List of all available keyboard shortcuts.

NotificationCenter.title: Notifications
NotificationCenter.loginDescription: You have securely signed in as user@example.com.
NotificationCenter.mentionDescription: You have been mentioned in a new comment.
NotificationCenter.reportDescription: The analytics report for the previous week has been generated.
NotificationCenter.exportDescription: The data you requested has been downloaded in CSV format.
NotificationCenter.versionDescription: Check the latest version for new features and improvements.

setup.title: Create your local vault
setup.description: Your notes are stored encrypted on this device only. No account or internet required.
setup.recoveryWarning: Your master password is never stored anywhere. If you forget it, your encrypted notes cannot be recovered.
setup.consent: I understand that my data cannot be recovered if I forget my password.
setup.error: The vault could not be created. Please try again.

unlock.description: Enter your master password to open your notes
unlock.wrongPassword: The password could not be verified.
unlock.localOnlyNotice: This vault is stored only on your device. If you forget your master password, your encrypted notes cannot be accessed.

list.emptyDescription: Notes will appear here once you create them.

trash.confirmDescription: This cannot be undone. The note and all of its subpages will be permanently deleted.

settings.title: Notes settings
settings.description: Manage your security and locking preferences.
settings.autoLockHint: The vault locks automatically after this period of inactivity.
settings.backupDescription: Export or import your encrypted backup

changePassword.title: Change master password
changePassword.description: Your notes are not re-encrypted; only the vault key is re-protected with your new password.
changePassword.error: The password could not be changed. Please try again.

command.title: Command palette
command.placeholder: Search notes or type a command…

shell.noNoteDescription: Select a note from the sidebar or create a new one.

error.storageDescription: Local storage could not be accessed. You may be in private browsing mode or out of storage space.
error.corruptRecords: {count} record(s) could not be decrypted and were skipped. They were not deleted.

language.title: Choose your language
language.description: Select the app language. You can change it later in settings.

welcome.title: Welcome to your notebook 👋
welcome.paragraph1: This is your encrypted notebook, stored entirely on your device. Start by editing this note.
welcome.paragraph2: Type "/" at the start of a line to add blocks: headings, lists, to-dos, tables, code, callouts and more.
welcome.paragraph3: Use Cmd/Ctrl+K for quick search and commands, and Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+L to lock the vault instantly.

reset.title: Reset the vault?
reset.description: A local vault's password cannot be recovered. If you continue, all encrypted notes on this device are permanently deleted and you can create a new vault. This cannot be undone.

backup.title: Backup
backup.hint: The backup file is encrypted and contains only ciphertext. Your vault password is still required to restore it.
backup.importConfirmDescription: This replaces your current vault with the backup and overwrites all current notes. Enter the backup's master password to restore and unlock it.

Updater.title: Update available
Updater.installing: Installing update… The app will restart.
Updater.installFailed: The update could not be installed. Please try again.
Updater.webUnsupported: Update check is not supported in the web version.
